compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The biome is experiencing a near-total systemic collapse. The expected specimens (P1-P4) are not visually identifiable as living plants. The pots contain only substrate and debris.

plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: White rabbit anchor present; no Pothos foliage visible.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Black_Pot: No distinct specimen visible; substrate appears dormant/barren.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Substrate appears dark and potentially hydrophobic; no signs of active root systems.
biome_observations.surface_debris: Presence of white granular material (likely perlite or mineral deposits) and structural debris.
biome_observations.lighting_impact: Low-light conditions exacerbate the difficulty of identifying micro-sprouts, but none are detected.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t_minus_3: Initial state shows bare soil; no significant growth observed.
temporal_deltas.t_minus_3_to_t_minus_2: Minor shift in debris position; no biological development.
temporal_deltas.t_minus_2_to_t_minus_1: A singular, thin, green, linear structure (likely a sprout or remnant stem) appears in the lower pot, but it lacks vitality.
temporal_deltas.t_minus_1_to_current: The linear structure has either collapsed or is obscured by the current low-light capture; the biome remains effectively dormant.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of total senescence or death. There is no evidence of photosynthetic activity or structural integrity in any of the registered plants.
anomalies: Total absence of expected plant biomass.
Persistent presence of the white rabbit anchor in an otherwise empty pot.
Lack of any secondary growth or moss, suggesting a sterile or hostile soil environment.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic failure of the botanical collection. Across the five-day observation window, the pots have remained devoid of healthy, identifiable plant life. The 'linear structure' noted in the T-1 image was the only potential sign of life, but it has failed to develop or persist. The biome is currently a collection of empty, soil-filled vessels.
